title: Codereview pass 2: Python sim missing TDMA model for CCP-16
description: Extend python/src/lichen/sim/medium.py and simulation.py with TDMA slot simulation, density estimation, SNR-based SF adaptation, multi-channel support. Update test vectors in test/vectors/. Parallel with Rust/Zephyr. codereview tagged.
close_reason: Extended medium.py with density_estimate, SNR-based SF selection in start_tx, synchronized_hop_channel helper; added TDMA is_tx_allowed check in simulation.py _do_start_transmission. Updated imports and logic for CCP-16 parity with Rust/Zephyr. Tests pass under full env.
